item.title: 🐶 Puppy – HTB Writeup
item.description: Start credentials: levi.james : KingofAkron2025! 🔍 Recon - Nmap Scan We begin with an Nmap scan: nmap -sC -sV -Pn 10.10.11.70 PORT STATE SERVICE 53/tcp open domain 88/tcp open kerberos-sec 111/tcp open rpcbind 135/tcp open msrpc 139/tcp open netbios-ssn 389/tcp open ldap 445/tcp open microsoft-ds 464/tcp open kpasswd5 593/tcp open http-rpc-epmap 636/tcp open ldapssl 2049/tcp open nfs 3260/tcp open iscsi 3268/tcp open globalcatLDAP 3269/tcp open globalcatLDAPssl 5985/tcp open wsman This is clearly an Active Directory environment.
